title: Blueprint Review Desk
concept: A Blueprint-first, table-led WordPress Playground workspace for core contributors who need to inspect catalog entries, run Blueprint URLs, preview PR sources, and manage saved review Playgrounds without losing operational controls.
focus: Blueprint catalog as the first viewport
Dense management table with persistent selected Blueprint inspector
Distinct launch routes for PRs, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, Vanilla WordPress, and .zip import
Visible save destination and saved-site lifecycle states
flows: Select a Blueprint from the catalog table, inspect JSON, run it, then save it
Choose between browser storage and local directory save destinations with progress and saved identity
Rename or delete a saved Playground from the saved management table
Start from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or .zip import
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, export, and download actions
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery categories, search, selected detail, inspect, run, copy, and download
WordPress, PHP, language, older version, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, tree, and code editor
Current Blueprint file editing, run, copy, and download
Database driver, SQLite path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
